chapter_title.en: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)

text: 5872 - وَ رَوَى اِبْنُ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ عَنْ إِسْحَاقَ بْنِ عَمَّارٍ قَالَ قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "يَا إِسْحَاقُ صَانِعِ اَلْمُنَافِقَ بِلِسَانِكَ وَ أَخْلِصْ وُدَّكَ لِلْمُؤْمِنِ وَ إِنْ جَالَسَكَ يَهُودِيٌّ فَأَحْسِنْ مُجَالَسَتَهُ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5872 - Ibn Abi Umayr narrated from Ishaq ibn Ammar, who said that Abu Abdullah Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as), peace be upon him, said:
"O' Ishaq, be courteous to the hypocrite with your speech, but keep your sincere affection for the believer. And if a Jew sits with you, then treat him with good companionship."
